Property.name: modulationDestinationsPrefixTitles
Property.value: Mod =Modulator;Car =Carrier;Voice =Voice;L01 =Layer 1;L02 =Layer 2;L03 =Drum Layers:Bass;L04 =Drum Layers:Snare;L05 =Drum Layers:Tom;L06 =Drum Layers:Cymbal;L07 =Drum Layers:Hi-Hat;BD =Drum Layers:Bass;BD Mod =Drum Layers:Bass:Modulator;BD Car =Drum Layers:Bass:Carrier;SD =Drum Layers:Snare;TOM =Drum Layers:Tom;TCY =Drum Layers:Cymbal;HH =Drum Layers:Hi-Hat;Step0 =Steps:Step 1;Step1 =Steps:Step 2;Step2 =Steps:Step 3;Step3 =Steps:Step 4;Step4 =Steps:Step 5;Step5 =Steps:Step 6;Step6 =Steps:Step 7;Step7 =Steps:Step 8;Step8 =Steps:Step 9;Step9 =Steps:Step 10;Step10 =Steps:Step 11;Step11 =Steps:Step 12;Step12 =Steps:Step 13;Step13 =Steps:Step 14;Step14 =Steps:Step 15

Style.name: STEPEDITAliases
Style.aliases: Mod Mult;Mod Level;Car Level;Mod Feedback;Car Mult;Mod Wave;Car Wave;Mod Tremolo;Mod Vibrato;Mod EnvPerc;Mod KS Rate;Mod Coarse Tune;Mod Fine Tune;Mod Fixed Pitch;Car Tremolo;Car Vibrato;Car EnvPerc;Car KS Rate;Car Tremolo;Car Vibrato;Car EnvPerc;Car KS Rate;Car Coarse Tune;Car Fine Tune;Car Fixed Pitch;BD Trigger;BD Mod Tremolo;BD Mod Vibrato;BD Mod EnvPerc;BD Mod KS Rate;BD Mod Mult;BD Mod Wave;BD Mod Level;BD Mod Feedback;BD Car Tremolo;BD Car Vibrato;BD Car EnvPerc;BD Car KS Rate;BD Car Mult;BD Car Wave;SD Trigger;SD Tremolo;SD Vibrato;SD EnvPerc;SD KS Rate;SD Mult;SD Wave;TOM Trigger;TOM Tremolo;TOM Vibrato;TOM EnvPerc;TOM KS Rate;TOM Mult;TOM Wave;TCY Trigger;TCY Tremolo;TCY Vibrato;TCY EnvPerc;TCY KS Rate;TCY Mult;TCY Wave;HH Trigger;HH Tremolo;HH Vibrato;HH EnvPerc;HH KS Rate;HH Mult;HH Wave;Voice Detune;Voice Transpose;Voice Amplitude;L01 Instrument;L01 Amp (steps);L01 Detune;L01 Transpose;L02 Instrument;L02 Amp (steps);L02 Detune;L02 Transpose;L03 Amp (steps);L03 Detune;L03 Transpose;L04 Amp (steps);L04 Detune;L04 Transpose;L05 Amp (steps);L05 Detune;L05 Transpose;L06 Amp (steps);L06 Detune;L06 Transpose;L07 Amp (steps);L07 Detune;L07 Transpose;Additive;Sw Tremolo Rate;Sw Tremolo Level
